name: Watchtower
description: Automatically updates running Docker containers when new images are available. Set it and forget it.

env.label: Remove Old Images
env.description: Automatically remove old images after updating

env.label: Check Interval (seconds)
env.description: How often to check for updates in seconds (default: 24 hours)

env_note: Watchtower runs as a background service with no web UI.
